

# Welcome 👋

Hi! I'm Amanda — a medical doctor and MPH student exploring health data analysis using R.

## 🔬 My Focus
- Public health
- Data analysis with R
- Epidemiology

## 📊 Featured Projects
- Global Life Expectancy Analysis (coming soon)

---

## 📫 Connect with me
- GitHub: https://github.com/amdmaharani
